title: Podman opens the console and makes strange http get requests
body:
### Issue Description

Podman after starting the Windows opens the console and begins to make some endless http get requests. What does Podman request?
![image](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/133128565/526c4ab8-0e2e-4a9d-99ae-f0897cdd6ee2)


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Restart Windows 11 after the start, this window appears



### Describe the results you received

Podman after starting the Windows opens the console and begins to make some endless http get requests.

### Describe the results you expected

Podman after running Windows should not open incomprehensible consoles and make strange requests. What are these requests?

### Privileged Or Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
This does not look like anything podman is doing. Are you using podman-desktop with openshift local?

It look like messages from crc, @gbraad any idea?
I don't use openshift local. I installed openshift local, but did not initialize or configure openshift local

That is from CRC as is related to the option to "Run console applications in Windows Terminal". We are fixing this.

Please close this issue as it is unrelated to Podman. Follow https://github.com/crc-org/crc/issues/3726 instead.

Since you "Installed it" you are using it. It sets up a daemon to allow the service to be started. THe `/api/status` call you see, is because the extension requests if an environment is available / running. You can close this when not using. It will be fixed in future releases to not show, it is an issue causes due to introduced changes from the Windows Terminal on Win10/11.
